title: TraceSpan
description: A timed span within a HarnessTrace. Each span captures a logical step (LLM call, tool call, planning step, etc.).

spanId.description: Span identifier, unique within its parent trace (e.g. 'step_3').

traceId.description: Parent HarnessTrace id. Optional for in-flight spans before flush.

parentSpanId.description: Optional parent span for nested execution graphs.

startMs.description: Epoch milliseconds when the span opened.

endMs.description: Epoch milliseconds when the span closed. Null while still in flight.
